creator: br@muenster.de
text:
Europe changed to daylight savings time this night
at 02:00 local time (01:00 UTC). My timezone is set to
"Europe/Berlin". /sbin/adjkerntz -a didn't work
correctly from /etc/crontab. I got a mail from adjkerntz at
04:01 and 04:31 local time (02:01 and 02:31 UTC) containing the
following error message: "adjkerntz: Warning: nonexistent UTC time".
adjkerntz DID NOT set machdep.adjkerntz to the new timezone.

Fix: 

Run "/sbin/adjkerntz -a" at 5:01 (local time) or later.
How-To-Repeat: setenv TZ Etc/UTC
date 9803290200
setenv TZ Etc/Berlin
/sbin/adjkerntz
